notes: Level 6 manual review override shard for spell indexes 30-34 in generated discovery row order.
This packet covers Otto's Irresistible Dance, Planar Ally, Primordial Ward, Programmed Illusion, and Scatter.

ottos-irresistible-dance::attack_or_save.issue: The initial Wisdom save, repeat save, attack-roll disadvantage, and Dexterity-save disadvantage are represented, but runtime lacks first-class saving-throw disadvantage and attacker-advantage-against-target fields.
ottos-irresistible-dance::attack_or_save.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveDisadvantage and attackerAdvantageAgainstTarget data.

ottos-irresistible-dance::vision_light_s.issue: The visible target requirement is already represented by targeting.lineOfSight.

ottos-irresistible-dance::social_or_know.issue: The Charmed condition, dancing in place, attack-roll disadvantage, Dexterity-save disadvantage, attacker advantage, and repeat-save action are represented in runtime effects/options.
ottos-irresistible-dance::social_or_know.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional social/knowledge field required for this pass.
ottos-irresistible-dance::social_or_know.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by STATUS_CONDITION, MOVEMENT, DEFENSIVE, and UTILITY effects.

ottos-irresistible-dance::status_or_stat.issue: The Charmed condition is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect.

planar-ally::choice_or_mode.issue: Requesting a named creature is represented as a utility option, but runtime lacks a first-class named-creature request field and DM-choice substitution outcome.
planar-ally::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add requested creature/name and substitution outcome fields.

planar-ally::multi_instance_or_split_tar.issue: The detector matched requesting a specific creature, but the spell sends one planar ally; no multi-instance targeting is required.
planar-ally::multi_instance_or_split_tar.recommendedTemplateChange: Track requested identity under choice_or_mode instead.

planar-ally::target_filter_or_eligibilit.issue: The ally must be a Celestial, Elemental, or Fiend loyal to the known entity and appear in an unoccupied space; runtime records form options but lacks loyalty/source and unoccupied-placement fields.
planar-ally::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon source/loyalty and unoccupied placement fields.
planar-ally::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonSourceEntity and summonPlacement data.

planar-ally::terrain_or_surface.issue: The detector matched hazardous/nonhazardous task payment language; that is a bargaining/payment rule, not terrain.

planar-ally::vision_light_sound.issue: The matched prose is beseeching/communication flavor around a bargaining mechanic, not a light/sound targeting mechanic.

planar-ally::message_or_communication.issue: The caster can speak a specific creature's name and must communicate to bargain; runtime records these as utility options but lacks first-class negotiation/communication requirements.
planar-ally::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add negotiation communication and named request fields.

planar-ally::summon_or_controlled_entity.issue: The creature appears but is not compelled to behave; runtime records SUMMONING and utility prose, but lacks first-class uncontrolled summoned ally/negotiated service state.
planar-ally::summon_or_controlled_entity.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled/uncontrolled summon and negotiated-service fields.

planar-ally::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The ally returns to its home plane after task completion, service expiration, or failed negotiation; runtime records this in utility options but lacks first-class return-home-plane triggers.

planar-ally::resource_or_consumption.issue: Minute/hour/day payment rates, discounts, greater gifts, sacrifices, quests, and waivers are represented as utility options but lack first-class payment/resource fields.
planar-ally::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: Add service payment schedule, discount, and alternate payment fields.

planar-ally::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Known cosmic power, named request, bargain terms, ethos alignment, suicidal task refusal, and DM-adjusted payment are social/knowledge mechanics represented as utility options but not first-class data.
planar-ally::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bargain/social constraint fields for service spells.

primordial-ward::reaction_or_opportunity.issue: The reaction to gain immunity to the triggering damage type is represented as a DEFENSIVE immunity effect with reaction sustain cost.
primordial-ward::reaction_or_opportunity.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional reaction field required for this pass.

primordial-ward::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The trigger is taking one of the listed damage types; runtime records reaction immunity but lacks a first-class damage-type-trigger filter tied to the triggering damage packet.
primordial-ward::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Add damage-trigger filters for reaction defenses.

primordial-ward::damage_reduction_or_pre.issue: The listed resistances and reaction immunity are represented as DEFENSIVE effects.
primordial-ward::damage_reduction_or_pre.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional damage-prevention field required for this pass.
primordial-ward::damage_reduction_or_pre.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DEFENSIVE resistance and immunity effects.

primordial-ward::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched elemental damage types; this is damage prevention, not an environmental change.

primordial-ward::conditional_ending.issue: Using the reaction ends the resistances and then ends the spell at the end of the caster's next turn; runtime records this as utility options but lacks first-class conditional replacement/ending fields.
primordial-ward::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add defense replacement and delayed conditional spell-end fields.
primordial-ward::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime defenseReplacement and conditionalSpellEnd data.

programmed-illusion::vision_light_sound.issue: The illusion's visual/audible trigger, sounds, hollow noise, and see-through discernment are represented as sensory utility options.
programmed-illusion::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate vision/light/sound field required for this pass.

programmed-illusion::illusion_or_disguis.issue: The illusion size, scripted behavior/sounds, imperceptible dormant state, trigger activation, 5-minute performance, 10-minute dormancy, repeat activation, physical interaction reveal, Study action reveal, and hollow sound are represented as utility options but lack first-class illusion lifecycle fields.
programmed-illusion::illusion_or_disguis.recommendedTemplateChange: Add programmed illusion trigger, performance duration, dormancy, reactivation, and reveal fields.

programmed-illusion::sensor_or_remote_pe.issue: Seeing through the image and hollow sounds after discernment are represented as sensory utility options.

programmed-illusion::ward_alarm_or_trigg.issue: The activation trigger can be general or detailed but must be visual or audible within 30 feet of the area; runtime records this as utility options but lacks first-class trigger condition fields.

scatter::choice_or_mode.issue: Choosing up to five creatures is represented by multi-target targeting and utility options.
scatter::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.
scatter::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by maxTargets=5 and UTILITY controlOptions.

scatter::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save for unwilling targets is represented by the MOVEMENT condition.

scatter::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: The destination must be an unoccupied visible space within 120 feet; runtime records teleport distance and utility options but lacks first-class destination occupancy/visibility filters.
scatter::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport destination visibility and occupancy fields.

scatter::terrain_or_surface.issue: The destination must be on the ground or on a floor; runtime records this as a utility option but lacks first-class destination surface fields.

scatter::vision_light_sound.issue: The caster-visible source targets and destination are represented by lineOfSight plus utility destination options.
scatter::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional vision/light/sound field required for this pass.
scatter::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting.lineOfSight and UTILITY controlOptions.

scatter::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Teleportation up to 120 feet is represented as a MOVEMENT teleport effect.
scatter::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional travel field required for this pass.

scatter::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched air quivering around targets; this is visual spell presentation, while the teleport mechanic is tracked separately.
